faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Bedford Park homes?
faqs.answer: Bedford Park's abundance of trees and green spaces, especially near Mosholu Parkway and the Botanical Garden, attracts stink bugs in late summer and fall. As temperatures drop, these pests seek warm shelter in homes through cracks, windows, and vents, making Bedford Park residences particularly vulnerable to infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to stink bug problems in Bedford Park?

faqs.question: When is stink bug season in Bedford Park, and how can I prevent them?
faqs.answer: Stink bugs are most active in Bedford Park from September through November when seeking winter shelter, and again in early spring. Prevention includes sealing cracks around windows and doors, repairing damaged screens, installing door sweeps, and scheduling a professional inspection before peak season. Our technicians can weatherproof your Bedford Park home against future invasions.
